final:
module shift_register(  
    input reset_clk,  
    input rst,  
    input load,  
    input shift_en,  
    input [7:0] data_in,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  

    always @(posedge reset_clk or posedge rst) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            data_out <= 8'b0;  
        end else if (load) begin  
            data_out <= data_in;  
        end else if (shift_en) begin  
            data_out <= {1'b0, data_out[7:1]};  // Shift right with zero fill  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
